raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction and proposes a rewritten section that resolves it honestly, demonstrating end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names prior work (Self-Refine, Reflexion, SelfCheckGPT) and articulates the delta in terms of domain application and evaluation, but could further map against the nearest 3-5 works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., IPCC AR6 WGII regional chapters, downscaled-GCM sources).",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, but could further clarify the uncertainty associated with specific claims or results.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope creep.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., inflated novelty, underspecified stopping criterion).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction and proposes a rewritten section that resolves it honestly, demonstrating end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names prior work (Self-Refine, Reflexion, SelfCheckGPT) and articulates the delta in terms of domain application and evaluation, but could further map against the nearest 3-5 works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., IPCC AR6 WGII regional chapters, downscaled-GCM sources).
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, but could further clarify the uncertainty associated with specific claims or results.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope creep.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., inflated novelty, underspecified stopping criterion).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability.
